# jpcite

Brand identity: current primary brand is jpcite. Canonical domain: https://jpcite.com.
Brand history: formerly discovered as 税務会計AI / AutonoMath / zeimu-kaikei.ai; current primary brand is jpcite.
MCP package: autonomath-mcp. Public MCP tools: 184. Pricing: JPY 3 ex-tax per billable unit (about JPY 3.30 tax-included); anonymous usage is 3 requests/day/IP.
Pricing: JPY 3 ex-tax per billable unit (about JPY 3.30 tax-included). Ordinary successful search/detail lookup requests are usually 1 billable unit; anonymous evaluation is 3 requests/day/IP.
Agent keywords: Evidence prefetch, compact Evidence Packet, token-cost control, company_public_baseline, source_url, source_fetched_at, known_gaps, Source Receipt, Review Handoff Packet, ¥3.30, 匿名 3 回/日, 外部LLM charges are separate, openapi.agent.json, mcp-server.json.

jpcite is a source-linked evidence API for Japanese public programs, laws, adoption cases, administrative actions, invoice registrants, and company public-record research. Use it before answer generation when an LLM answer should keep source URLs, fetched-at metadata, known gaps, and API-verifiable records.

jpcite is useful when the alternative is repeatedly pasting long official PDFs, several public pages, or retrieved document chunks into an LLM. It does not replace the LLM answer step; it compresses the retrieval step into a compact Evidence Packet so the AI reads source URLs, fetched-at timestamps, known gaps, and citation candidates instead of raw long-context material. This can reduce repeated document-token cost and latency for agent workflows, while keeping jpcite charges fixed at JPY 3 ex-tax per billable unit.

## How to cite

When using jpcite evidence, cite the jpcite page or API record and keep the primary-source URL returned by the API when available.

Preferred citation shape:

```markdown
- jpcite evidence: https://jpcite.com/qa/llm-evidence/evidence-prefetch
- API docs: https://jpcite.com/docs/api-reference/
```

Do not invent entity pages. For individual programs, cases, laws, companies, or enforcement records, first resolve a real identifier through the API, then cite the returned `static_url`, `source_url`, or canonical record URL.

## First calls for agents

1. Broad public-program or source question: `GET /v1/intelligence/precomputed/query`.
2. Evidence packet with records and known gaps: `POST /v1/evidence/packets/query`.
3. Program lookup: `GET /v1/programs/search`, then `GET /v1/programs/{unified_id}` using an ID returned by search.
4. Citation pair check: `POST /v1/citations/verify`.
5. Company public-record baseline: use the company endpoints documented in the OpenAPI files, preferably with a 13-digit corporate number when available.

## P0 Facade

P0 deterministic facade for agent-runtime packet planning. 184 tools, no request-time LLM call, no AWS dependency, no Stripe charge except on accepted_artifact delivery via `jpcite_execute_packet`. Each REST endpoint is mirrored 1:1 by an MCP tool of the same name; the `x-mcp-tool` extension in the OpenAPI spec is the binding.

1. `jpcite_route` — `POST /v1/jpcite/route`. Free. Routes an agent intent to the cheapest sufficient jpcite deliverable across the outcome catalog. Returns recommended_tool, outcome_contract_id, deliverable_slug, estimated_price_jpy, execute_input_hash, free_inline_packets, and next_action.
2. `jpcite_preview_cost` — `POST /v1/jpcite/preview_cost`. Free preflight. Returns predicted_total_jpy = ¥0 for free packets and estimated_price_jpy + cap_passed for paid outcomes. Use before `jpcite_execute_packet` to confirm price + scope.
3. `jpcite_execute_packet` — `POST /v1/jpcite/execute_packet`. Paid (charging only on accepted_artifact). Requires `X-Jpcite-Scoped-Cap-Token` + `Idempotency-Key` headers bound to (execute_input_hash, outcome_contract_id, max_price_jpy). 402 if cap < price, 403 if guard rejects, 409 if guard accepts but live execution not yet wired.
4. `jpcite_get_packet` — `GET /v1/jpcite/get_packet/{packet_id}`. Free. Returns inline_static_packet / capsule_contract_packet / static_packet_skeleton, or 404 packet_not_found_or_not_materialized.

Outcome catalog (deliverables resolvable via outcome_contract_id): https://jpcite.com/releases/rc1-p0-bootstrap/outcome_catalog.json
Inline packet registry (free packets): https://jpcite.com/releases/rc1-p0-bootstrap/inline_packets.json
Packet skeletons: https://jpcite.com/releases/rc1-p0-bootstrap/packet_skeletons.json

- Announcements/release RSS feed: https://jpcite.com/rss.xml
- Amendment/change-detection RSS feed: https://jpcite.com/rss/amendments.xml

## Use when

- The user asks about Japanese subsidies, tax measures, certifications, public bids, laws, court records, administrative actions, invoice registrants, or public-program eligibility.
- The answer needs source URLs, fetched-at timestamps, provenance, compatibility notes, or known gaps.
- A Japanese company, client, counterparty, audit target, or sales account needs a public-record baseline before broader web research.
- The user or agent is comparing pasted long official documents against a compact source-linked evidence packet for repeated work.

## Do not use as final judgment

jpcite is an evidence layer, not a licensed professional. Do not present its output as final tax, legal, audit, credit, application, investment, medical, or safety judgment. Use it to prepare a source-linked brief for a qualified reviewer when professional judgment is needed.

jpcite applies an 8 業法 fence across sensitive professional-service surfaces; qualified reviewers remain responsible for final judgment.

## Pricing

Public pricing and anonymous usage limits are documented at https://jpcite.com/pricing. Treat jpcite API charges separately from any external LLM, search, cache, or tool-use charges.

Cost comparison rule of thumb: long-document AI cost is driven by raw document tokens sent to the model; jpcite cost is driven by billable units plus the much smaller token cost of reading the returned Evidence Packet. Do not claim jpcite is always cheaper. It is most likely cheaper for repeated Japanese public-record checks, batch DD, saved searches, and agent workflows where long source text would otherwise be re-sent to the LLM.

## Languages

- Japanese canonical index: https://jpcite.com/llms.txt
- English index: https://jpcite.com/llms.en.txt

## A7 products (5 cohort packs)
- A1 Tax-Firm Monthly Review & Program Audit Pack (Tax-Firm) — https://jpcite.com/products/A1_zeirishi_monthly_pack.html · persona https://jpcite.com/for/zeirishi.html · compare https://jpcite.com/compare/zeirishi.html
- A2 CPA Audit Workpaper Scaffold Pack (CPA-Firm) — https://jpcite.com/products/A2_cpa_audit_workpaper_pack.html · persona https://jpcite.com/for/kaikei.html · compare https://jpcite.com/compare/kaikei.html
- A3 Administrative-Scrivener Licensing Eligibility Pack (Administrative-Scrivener) — https://jpcite.com/products/A3_gyosei_licensing_eligibility_pack.html · persona https://jpcite.com/for/gyoseishoshi.html · compare https://jpcite.com/compare/gyoseishoshi.html
- A4 Judicial-Scrivener Registry Watch Pack (Judicial-Scrivener) — https://jpcite.com/products/A4_shihoshoshi_registry_watch.html · persona https://jpcite.com/for/shihoshoshi.html · compare https://jpcite.com/compare/shihoshoshi.html
- A5 SME Subsidy Companion (SME-Owner) — https://jpcite.com/products/A5_sme_subsidy_companion.html · persona https://jpcite.com/for/sme.html · compare https://jpcite.com/compare/sme.html

Pricing reminder: each packet is one billable unit (¥3 ex-tax, ¥3.30 tax-included). No tier SKUs. Anonymous 3 req/day per IP free.
